title: Refreshed and Refurbished
description: Makes minecraft feel alive and fun again from compleatly changing the terrain to all the little details that make a diffrence
body:
Minecraft is kinda boring. This modpack revamps all of minecraft! it changes terrain, sound, quality of life (lots of mods for this), structures, progression (a little). if you enjoy a this modpack please join my discord and if you want me to add a mod just ask!
(for the enviorments some mods like teralith are needed just on server others like do a barrel roll are just client and stuff like custom blocks are needed for both so i would just reccoment having all mods on both sides). 8GB+ ram reccomended also far generation using chunky for best experience and visuals
